display.purpose: Landing hero headlines only. Never in product UI.

title.purpose: Card titles, list item headers, metric labels.

label.purpose: Tags, timestamps, small metadata. Uppercase for section labels only.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Active tab pill, selected filter chip.

shadows.name: ambient-medium
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus, select popovers, floating panels.

shadows.name: ambient-high
shadows.purpose: Modals (rare), camera recorder overlay, choreography floating toolbars.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Button hover, tab switch, border color.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA and action button. Pill-shaped, ice-deep fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.42 0.12 240); color: white; padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border: none; border-radius: 30px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.72 0.12 240); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.72 0.12 240); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border: 1px solid oklch(0.815 0 0); border-radius: 30px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.967 0 0); border-color: oklch(0.55 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.72 0.12 240); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Data-dense card for session list, progress dashboard, profile stats.
components.html:
Jump HeightGOOD
1.24 m
+0.08 m from last
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background: white; border: 1px solid oklch(0.815 0 0); border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-metric-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-metric-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.55 0 0); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-metric-badge { background: oklch(0.723 0.219 149); color: white; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-metric-delta { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.55 0 0); margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard form input with ice focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.967 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.815 0 0); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.55 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.145 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.72 0.12 240 / 0.4); } .ds-input:invalid { border-color: oklch(0.541 0.22 25); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.541 0.22 25 / 0.2); }

components.name: Navigation Tab
components.description: App navigation tab. Active state with bottom border.
components.html: SessionsProgressProfile
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.55 0 0); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; transition: color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: oklch(0.967 0 0); } .ds-nav-active { color: oklch(0.145 0 0); position: relative; } .ds-nav-active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 16px; right: 16px; height: 2px; background: oklch(0.42 0.12 240); border-radius: 1px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { background: oklch(0.967 0 0); color: oklch(0.55 0 0); padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-chip:hover { color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-chip-active { background: oklch(0.42 0.12 240); color: white; } .ds-chip-active:hover { background: oklch(0.58 0.12 240); }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Flat surface container with hairline border. No shadow at rest.
components.html:
Session Analysis

Biomechanical breakdown of your latest jump attempts.
components.css: .ds-card { background: white; border: 1px solid oklch(0.815 0 0); border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.55 0 0); }

components.name: Score Badge
components.description: Color-coded score indicator. Always includes text, never color-only.
components.css: .ds-score-good, .ds-score-mid, .ds-score-bad { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; font-family: 'Inter Variable', Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-score-good { background: oklch(0.723 0.219 149); color: white; } .ds-score-mid { background: oklch(0.795 0.184 86); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-score-bad { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27); color: white; }

narrative.overview: A system that treats the interface as an analytical environment: cold, precise, and fast. The aesthetic draws from the physical reality of figure skating (ice, blade, speed) without falling into seasonal clichés. No snowflakes, no winter pastels, no soft romantic gradients. Instead: sharp blues, graphite neutrals, and data-forward layouts that let athletes and coaches see what matters in under two seconds.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained product surfaces with a single cold accent (ice-deep) used sparingly
Tonal layering for elevation; shadows only on floating overlays
Pill-shaped interactive elements for touch targets, with sharp state feedback
Weight-500 typography for all interactive and data text; weight-400 for long prose only
Metric-forward layouts: scores, charts, and progress indicators are scannable at a glance
Flat cards with hairline borders; no lift shadows on static containers

rules.name: The One Ice Rule
rules.body: The ice-blue accent is the only non-neutral hue in the product UI. No secondary brand colors, no category colors, no avatar color cycles.

rules.name: The No-Winter-Cliché Rule
rules.body: No snowflake icons, no frosted decorative borders, no 'frozen glass' effects on product screens.

rules.name: The 500-Dominance Rule
rules.body: Weight 500 (Medium) is the default for every interactive element, label, button, and data point. Weight 400 is reserved for multi-sentence prose only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Every container is flat at rest. If a card has a shadow, it's wrong. Elevation is earned through interaction or overlay context, not decoration.

dos: Do use Ice Deep for ≤ 10% of any product screen surface
Do use weight 500 for every button, link, label, and data value
Do use hairline borders (1px Border token) to separate cards and sections
Do pair score colors with icons or numeric labels for colorblind accessibility
Do use pill-shaped buttons (30px radius) for all primary and secondary actions
Do keep body text lines under 75ch
donts: Don't use shadow on static cards or containers
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter blur) on product screens
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient)
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly
Don't use modals as a first solution
Don't make the platform feel like a SaaS cream clone (Linear-style warm neutrals, soft shadows, beige accents)
Don't make it feel like a crypto interface (neon accents, dark mode with purple gradients, glass cards)
Don't make it feel like health-tech software (pastel colors, gentle curves, reassuring soft copy)
Don't make it feel like a toy or game (cartoonish icons, badge confetti, gamification with levels and unlocks)
Don't make it feel like a raw engineering dashboard (monospace dumps, terminal aesthetics, unstyled data tables)
Don't use em dashes in copy
